title: calystegia silvatica subsp. orientalis
intro: Calystegia silvatica subsp. orientalis, also known as the Oriental false bindweed, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Convolvulaceae family. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its antispasmodic and anti-inflammatory effects, which can be used to treat various health issues such as digestive problems, skin conditions, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Calystegia silvatica subsp. orientalis include its ability to reduce anxiety and stress, improve sleep quality, and boost the immune system. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed orally to harness its medicinal properties.
